subject: fix: only remove /run/containerd if we need to bootstrap k8s (#161)
one_line_summary: Prevent removing /run/containerd when k8s is already bootstrapped, preserving idempotency

subject: fix: don't dereference symlinks in recursive ownership change (#141)
one_line_summary: Use Lchown instead of Chown to avoid following symlinks during recursive ownership changes

subject: fix: avoid LXD stop to speed up subsequent "prepare" calls (#124)
one_line_summary: Skip unnecessary LXD stop/restart when snap channel already matches, saving ~90s on re-runs

subject: fix: use a channel in the override test that is likely to stick around (#112)
one_line_summary: Switch test to use latest/edge channel instead of removed 1.31-classic/beta channel

subject: fix: Avoid waiting indefinitely for providers. (#74)
one_line_summary: Add timeouts to provider wait-ready commands to prevent indefinite hangs

subject: fix: look for more a specific error in checkBootstrapped (#65)
one_line_summary: Match 'controller <name> not found' instead of just 'not found' to avoid false negatives from transient errors

subject: fix: look for more a specific error in checkBootstrapped
one_line_summary: Tighten error string matching in checkBootstrapped to avoid misidentifying transient errors as missing controllers

subject: fix: update import path to make it importable (#58)
one_line_summary: Update Go module path from jnsgruk/concierge to canonical/concierge so the package is go-installable

subject: fix: install `iptables` for k8s provider if not present (#57)
one_line_summary: Install iptables dependency required by k8s snap when not already present on the system

subject: fix: retry bootstrap check on on controllers when there are errors
one_line_summary: Add retry with backoff for juju controller status checks to handle transient API failures

subject: fix: ensure disabled juju warning is shown
one_line_summary: Reference correct config field so disabled-juju warning is actually displayed

subject: fix: add retry to Snap channel lookup
one_line_summary: Add retry with backoff to snap channel lookups to handle transient snapd API errors

subject: fix: lookup channels for correct snap in SnapChannels
one_line_summary: Fix hardcoded 'microk8s' snap name in SnapChannels to use the actual requested snap name

subject: fix: don't retry SnapInfo lookup if snap not found
one_line_summary: Short-circuit retry loop when snap is definitively not found in the store

subject: fix: lookup snap in store and bail early if not exists in SnapInfo (#34)
one_line_summary: Pre-check snap existence in store before entering retry loop to fail fast on invalid snap names

subject: fix: ensure that `lxd` is started again after refresh
one_line_summary: Restart LXD snap after stopping it for refresh workaround to avoid leaving it in stopped state

subject: fix: Workaround LXD refresh issue
one_line_summary: Stop LXD before snap refresh to work around missing socket file issue during refresh

subject: fix: ensure `network` is enabled for k8s presets (#19)
one_line_summary: Add missing 'network' feature to k8s preset configurations

subject: fix: ensure `k8s bootstrap` is idempotent
one_line_summary: Check if k8s needs bootstrap before attempting it, making concierge prepare safe to re-run

subject: fix: log command output on failure (#16)
one_line_summary: Always log command output when a command fails, not just in trace mode

subject: fix: use 1.31-classic/candidate channel by default for k8s
one_line_summary: Correct default k8s snap channel from 1.31/candidate to 1.31-classic/candidate

subject: fix: constrain juju controller volume with k8s snap
one_line_summary: Add root-disk constraint for juju bootstrap to prevent PVC allocation failure on small runners

subject: fix: add retry to snapd client requests
one_line_summary: Add exponential backoff retry to snapd client requests to handle 'too many requests' errors

subject: fix: add cli flag to override Canonical K8s channel
one_line_summary: Add missing CLI flag to allow overriding the Canonical K8s snap channel

subject: fix: remove explicit snap start for microk8s
one_line_summary: Remove redundant explicit snap start for microk8s since install already starts it

subject: fix: demote `$PATH` lookup logging to `DEBUG`
one_line_summary: Downgrade PATH lookup failure log from Warn to Debug to reduce noise

subject: fix: retry microk8s wait-ready command
one_line_summary: Add retry with timeout to microk8s wait-ready instead of single-shot execution

subject: fix: strip root user from `NewCommandAs` invocations
one_line_summary: Skip sudo wrapper when command is already running as root to avoid unnecessary privilege escalation

subject: fix: better logging for removal of packages during restore
one_line_summary: Add log messages for successful package and snap removal during restore

subject: fix: show debug logs when either `-v` or `--trace` are used
one_line_summary: Fix boolean condition from AND to OR so debug logs show with either -v or --trace flag

subject: fix: report confinement status for correct snap channel when specified
one_line_summary: Check confinement for the specified channel rather than the default channel

subject: fix: more robust shell path detection for command execution
one_line_summary: Fall back to bash/sh when SHELL env var is unset instead of failing command execution

subject: fix: ensure command path is looked up in `Command.commandString`
one_line_summary: Move PATH lookup into commandString so commands resolve correctly when run via shell

subject: fix: ensure logging is consistently capitalised
one_line_summary: Capitalize first letter of all log messages for consistent formatting

subject: fix: construct `Manager` correctly in `restore` subcommand
one_line_summary: Initialize Manager with proper config in restore command instead of using empty struct
